user.title: Nebo.Live Air Quality
user.description:
Enter the city slug from nebo.live.

Examples: {example_cities}

For Krasnoyarsk, the slug is "krs":
https://nebo.live/en/krs

select_sensors.title: Select Sensors — {city_name}
select_sensors.description: Found {sensor_count} sensors. Select which ones to track:

error.city_not_found: City not found. Check the slug and try again (e.g., "krs" for Krasnoyarsk).
error.no_sensors: No sensors found in this city.
error.no_selection: Please select at least one sensor.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. You can add more sensors in Options.

init.title: Nebo.Live Settings
init.description: Change the update interval or re-select which sensors to track.
